name: hexo
description: Command line interface for Hexo, a static site generator

args.name: name
args.description: Setting name. Leave it blank if you want to show all configurations

args.name: value
args.description: New value of a setting. Leave it blank if you just want to show a single configuration

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Displays a help for each command

args.name: command
args.description: The command to display help for

options.description: Copy files instead of cloning from GitHub
Skip npm install

args.name: destination
args.description: Folder path. Initialize in current folder if not specified

options.description: Post path. Customize the path of the post
Replace the current post if it existed
Post slug. Customize the URL of the post
Deploy after generation finishes
Force regenerate
Watch file changes
Raise an error if any unhandled exception is thrown during generation
Maximum number of files to be generated in parallel. Default is infinity

arg.name: concurrency
arg.description: The number of files to generate in parallel

subcommands.name: server
subcommands.description: Start a local server. By default, this is at http://localhost:4000/

options.description: Override the default server IP. Bind to all IP address by default

arg.name: ip
arg.description: The IP address to bind to

options.description: Override default port
Serve static files from the given directory
Enable logger. Override logger format

arg.name: format
arg.description: The morgan logger format. Can be predefined or customized

options.description: Immediately open the server url in your default web browser
Setup without deployment
Generate static files before deploying

subcommands.name: render
subcommands.description: Render files with renderer plugins (e.g. Markdown) and save them at the specified path

options.description: Specify render engine
Output destination. Result will be printed in the terminal if the output destination is not set
Prettify JSON output

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description: Migrate content from other blog systems

args.name: type
args.description: The type of migration. check https://hexo.io/docs/migration for more details

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.description: Clean the cache file (`db.json`) and generated files (`public`)

args.name: type
args.description: The type of routes to list

options.description: Uses a custom config file (instead of `_config.yml`). Also accepts a comma-separated list (no spaces) of JSON or YAML config files that will combine the files into a single `_multiconfig.yml`
Disable loading plugins and scripts
Log verbose messages to the terminal and to `debug.log`
Silence output to the terminal
Display draft posts (stored in the `source/_drafts` folder)
Customize the path of current working directory
